arts.ttl: Barcelona, Liverpool receive major boost Jonathan David pursuit as striker contract decision
arts.sum: European giants Barcelona and Liverpool reportedly receive a boost in their bid to sign Lille striker Jonathan David in 2025.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool striker Daniel Sturridge says the players are 'buying into' Arne Slot after Chelsea scalp as Micah Richards credits new manager for making title challengers a lot more solid defensively'
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundits Daniel Sturridge, Micah Richards and Jamie Carragher were full of praise for new Liverpool manager Arne Slot after his side's 2-1 victory over Chelsea on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Maresca happy with Chelsea’s performance despite defeat
arts.sum: Chelsea reaction. The post Maresca happy with Chelsea’s performance despite defeat appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher says he spotted something unusual about Arne Slot in Liverpool's win vs Chelsea
'Slot's more measured Liverpool pass biggest test yet'
arts.sum: Liverpool's "heavy metal" approach under Jurgen Klopp may be a thing of the past - but Arne Slot passed his first big test against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah's 'biggest reason for signing new Liverpool deal' comes to light
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is out of contract at the end of the season, but Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher is confident the forward will sign a new deal and remain at Anfield

arts.ttl: 'This stadium': Enzo Maresca makes comment about Anfield after Chelsea suffer 2-1 defeat vs Liverpool
Arne Slot can't hide frustration as Liverpool boss makes 'important' Anfield crowd claim
arts.sum: Arne Slot has hailed Anfield's role in Sunday's 2-1 win over Chelsea

arts.ttl: Slot questions referee calls despite Liverpool win
arts.sum: Arne Slot has suggested referee John Brooks wanted to prove he would not be intimidated by the Anfield crowd during Liverpool's 2-1 win over Chelsea.

arts.ttl: 'Really poor': Jamie Carragher strongly criticises £25m Chelsea player after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher wasn’t impressed by what he saw from a Chelsea player during Sunday’s defeat against Liverpool. Chelsea were beaten 2-1 away to Liverpool this...
